content.rendered: Ken is deeply passionate about working with partners to innovate and deliver amazing AI-powered devices and cloud experiences that empower every person and organization on the planet to achieve more. He joins AMI from Microsoft, working in a variety of roles, including Taiwan Country Manager and Vice President of Microsoft Device Partner Sales for the Americas. Prior to Microsoft, Ken served as Taiwan Country President for Schneider Electric as well as at National Instruments. As a founding board member of the Taiwan Climate Partnership and Taiwan Computer Association, Ken has been a trusted advisor for sustainability and supply chain transformation, representing the global high-tech manufacturing ecosystem at COP26. He holds a B.S. degree in Electrical Engineering from the University of Washington.
